title: Unify error taxonomy and boundary mapping
acceptance_criteria: Mapped error codes include E_STORE_IO,E_SEGMENT_NOT_FOUND,E_LLM_TIMEOUT,E_LLM_AUTH,E_LLM_PROVIDER
Normal execution paths do not leak raw provider tracebacks
Tool-facing compatibility text remains stable while metadata includes error_code

title: Implement capability-aware compaction strategy interface
acceptance_criteria: Compaction strategy selected via explicit capability detection
Unsupported capability triggers deterministic fallback with E_COMPACTION_UNAVAILABLE
Fallback path behavior matches current deterministic trim outcomes

title: Add MemoryBackend abstraction with none and mem0 pilot
acceptance_criteria: Feature flag off preserves existing behavior bit-for-bit on fixtures
Feature flag on enables semantic recall path through backend interface
Backend outage degrades safely to archive-only recall with E_MEMORY_BACKEND_UNAVAILABLE

title: Add recall verification and freshness gate
acceptance_criteria: Every semantic recall includes verification_state and freshness_state metadata
Policy blocks or downgrades unverified/stale recalls deterministically
Diagnostics capture why recall was allowed, downgraded, or blocked

title: Expand benchmark harness with quality latency cost metrics
acceptance_criteria: Benchmark output JSON includes recall@k, latency p50/p95, and token-budget deltas
Lost-in-the-middle adversarial slice is executed in harness
Benchmark output includes uncertainty tags for unsupported capabilities

title: Add CI gates for reliability and benchmark budgets
acceptance_criteria: Required CI gate enforces configured benchmark thresholds
Nightly/manual benchmark job uploads machine-readable artifacts
README documents gate intent and failure interpretation

title: Extend memory and compaction telemetry schema
acceptance_criteria: Telemetry includes recall_attempt/hit/miss and compaction_applied/fallback events
No-op telemetry mode has zero side effects in tests
Event keys and required fields are versioned and stable

title: Add CLI diagnostics for memory decisions
acceptance_criteria: CLI command shows selected recall source and verification/freshness result
CLI output surfaces fallback reasons for compaction and memory backend
Docs include at least one troubleshooting example for blocked recall
